title: delphinium anthriscifolium var. calleryi
intro: Delphinium anthriscifolium var. calleryi is a plant that belongs to the delphinium genus and is also known as Callery's delphinium or Callery's larkspur. It is a perennial plant native to China, and its roots and rhizomes have been used in traditional Chinese medicine for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Delphinium anthriscifolium var. calleryi include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and rhizomes are typically dried and made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties.
